name: Ring-o-Coconut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Semisweet chocolate pieces or milk chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease and lightly flour a 10-inch tube or Bundt pan.
2. Prepare filling: Set aside.
3. In a large mixer bowl, combine sugar, oil, and eggs; beat for 1 minute at high speed.
4. Add remaining ingredients except filling and nuts; beat for 3 minutes at medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in nuts by hand.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Carefully top with filling.
8. Cover with remaining batter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 70-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. If it starts to brown too quickly, cover with foil.
10. Cool upright in the pan for 15 minutes; then remove from the pan and cool completely.
11. If desired, drizzle with glaze.
FILLING:
1. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and egg until smooth.
2. Stir in coconut and chocolate pieces.
